title: viola × lutzii
intro: Viola × lutzii, also known as Sweet Woodruff or Wood Sorrel, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the violet family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Viola × lutzii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate anxiety, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
